## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, distribution, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aembit launched "Access Zero," a new microsite for premium, interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Agentic AI topics are performing well in terms of traffic and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [GrowthX suggested experimenting with article variations to address voice/tone concerns](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Distribution strategies for new content hub discussed, including Reddit and newsletter options](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

## Topics

### Access Zero Launch

  - [New microsite "Access Zero" soft-launched for hosting premium, interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [First campaign: "Credentialitis" - playful take on security issues Aembit solves](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Includes AI doctor, diagnostic quiz, and downloadable treatment guide](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Team seeking advice on distribution and scaling eyeballs on the content](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Agentic AI topics showing strong performance (51% increase in clicks, 1200% in impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Recent article on AI agents (late August) already gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Plan to use webinar-based articles as source material for maintaining consistent voice](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Proposal to create a document summarizing key concepts to ensure consistency across articles](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### Article Length and Quality

  - [Discussion on article length (recent 2,800-word article)](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Emphasis on comprehensive coverage rather than length for length's sake](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on impactful content throughout, avoiding surface-level sections](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

### Voice and Tone Concerns

  - [Ongoing issue with injecting Aembit's voice into blog content](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Proposal to experiment with different versions of a single article to identify effective approaches](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Plan to use webinar-based articles as a standard for checking voice consistency](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)

### Distribution Strategies

  - [Suggestions for Reddit campaigns, particularly for AI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Discussion of Beehive platform for newsletter distribution and subscriber acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Consideration of repurposing blog content for Access Zero in more interactive formats](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2417.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement last-mile process for ensuring voice consistency using webinar-based articles](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Experiment with variations of a single article to address voice/tone concerns](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Explore distribution strategies for Access Zero content (Reddit, newsletter options)](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Continue focus on agentic AI topics in upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Team to monitor and stay active on Slack during Dan's absence next week](https://fathom.video/share/i6_wi6-TyEfLii_puxW4yPYmRN6fp7vw?tab=summary&timestamp=2399.0)
